prompt: A dynamic medium shot captures a man on an outdoor basketball court, preparing to take a shot at the hoop. The court is marked with white lines on a reddish-brown surface, and the basketball hoop stands prominently in the center. The background features a grassy field bordered by a fence, with trees and some buildings visible in the distance under a clear sky. The man, wearing a light-colored t-shirt, black shorts, white socks, and green sneakers, is seen running towards the hoop with a basketball in his right hand. As he approaches, he transitions into a jump, extending his left leg forward for balance while holding the ball with both hands above his head. He releases the ball, aiming it towards the hoop, completing the sequence with a follow-through motion as the ball arcs towards the net. The final frame captures the ball in mid-air, heading towards the hoop, with the man's body positioned in a dynamic, athletic stance.
